name: davekjohns-workshop
description: Dave (DaveKJohn)'s workshop: the marketplace where all his Claude Code plugins are built. Houses, among other things, the Claude Specialists system (claude-code-plugins/claude-specialists/) across four plugins — the shared core plus three domain groups — consumable by multiple repos that toggle each plugin on or off.

plugins.name: specialists
plugins.description: Group 1 — the shared, repo-neutral core: the subagents that are effectively identical in every repo. Every consuming repo enables this. Governance (CLAUDE.md + .claude/manuals/*) stays at repo level.

plugins.name: specialists-lifehub
plugins.description: Group 2 — domain plugin for life-hub-style repos (a personal information hub / brain-based knowledge repo): Astrid, Fiona, Hugo, Ian, Onyx. Only a life-hub-style repo enables this.

plugins.name: specialists-shopify
plugins.description: Group 3 — domain plugin for Shopify store repos (e.g. smartwatchbanden): Liam, Sandra, Steven, plus the domain skill start-task. Only a Shopify repo enables this.

plugins.name: specialists-ecomm
plugins.description: Group 4 — domain plugin for commercial webshop repos (any platform): Sergio (SEO), Craig (CRO), Sean (performance/SEA), with room to grow into the wider e-commerce craft (lifecycle/email, analytics). Complementary to a platform group like specialists-shopify — a commercial webshop repo can enable both.
